name: Deduction for Specified Passenger Vehicle Loan Interest

eligibility.description: Applies to individuals with indebtedness incurred after December 31, 2024, secured by an applicable passenger vehicle where the lender is required to provide a Form 1098-style statement for interest over $600.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can deduct interest paid on specified passenger vehicle loans, provided the interest is reported by the lender under this section and meets the requirements of section 163(h)(4).
